gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN status AS T3 on T2.statusId = T3.statusId WHERE T3.status = 'Puncture' AND T1.nationality = 'American'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) 
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
JOIN status AS T3 ON T2.statusId = T3.statusId
WHERE T1.nationality = 'American' AND T3.status = 'Puncture';
question: How many American drivers have puncture status.
